title: On The Recovery Of Jessy Lewars.
content:
But rarely seen since Nature's birth,
            The natives of the sky;
        Yet still one seraph's left on earth,
            For Jessy did not die.

    R. B.
meaning:
Robert Burns's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "On The Recovery Of Jessy Lewars."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
